_comment: Game version the committed game-derived data (items.json, recipes.json, schematics.json, buildable-footprints.json, resource-nodes.json, icons, etc.) was generated from. Bump this whenever that data is regenerated for a new Satisfactory version. See PLANNING.md 'Game-version updates'.
notes: gameBuild + saveFormatVersion read from save headers (paulyamorous build 493833 / World2 491125, both saveVersion 60).
